name: agency/timevault
description: Timevault Migration & Backups — private agency plugin for secure WordPress backup, export, import and migration.

suggest.aws/aws-sdk-php: Required for the S3 storage destination (install only where S3 is used)
suggest.google/apiclient: Required for the Google Drive storage destination (install only where Drive is used)

scripts.test:setup: echo "Create the timevault_tests DB, then run composer test"
